steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The colon separates the blank from evidence showing the program identified sidewalks “more accurately” and distinguished between materials—demonstrating superior capability compared to the road-map method.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Superior” means better or higher quality, precisely what the evidence shows about the program's performance. Similar would incorrectly suggest equivalent capability, while changed and supportive lack the appropriate meaning. That matches choice D — D is correct.
